name: vemus-tools
description: Diagnose QMX/Vemus business issues from share links, online logs, and local service code.

interface.longDescription: Vemus Tools collects reusable QMX/Vemus business diagnostics for Codex. The first skill diagnoses third-party lyric cleanup issues for /v1/qmx_user_song/get_third_song_info by resolving Vemus share links, querying RMS/CLS logs, extracting raw LRC evidence, reproducing cleanup with current qmx_user_asset code, and presenting concrete raw/actual/expected lyric differences.
capabilities: Compare online cleanup with current code
Diagnose QMX lyric cleanup root causes
interface.defaultPrompt: Diagnose this Vemus or QMX lyric cleanup issue with online logs and current code evidence.
